isolation.validationPath: browser automation with deterministic fixture and local API evidence

assertionResults.reason: Validated in browser automation against the deterministic fixture route. Changing Result from All results to Victories immediately changed the badge/count from 2 loaded matches to 1 loaded match and reduced the visible cards to the Ahri victory card; zero-result messaging also appeared predictably when a conflicting impact-category filter was added.

evidence.consoleErrors: none via agent-browser errors after filter interactions
evidence.network: Local fixture-backed route /player/Validation%20Fixture#LOCAL plus read-only API confirmation from /api/stored-matches?puuid=validation-fixture-puuid&limit=20&offset=0 showing two loaded matches
notes: filtered-victories screenshot/body text showed Showing 1 of 2 loaded matches and Export scope: 1 filtered loaded match
filtered-zero-results screenshot/body text showed Showing 0 of 2 loaded matches with the truthful empty-state copy

assertionResults.reason: Validated in browser automation. After enabling Compact cards, a page reload preserved the compactCards preference in localStorage and the explicit deep-linked player route still reloaded Validation Fixture#LOCAL rather than any persisted identity.

evidence.consoleErrors: none via agent-browser errors after reload
evidence.network: Reload stayed on http://127.0.0.1:3005/player/Validation%20Fixture#LOCAL; /api/account for Validation Fixture#LOCAL returned the fixture account
evidence.localState: Before reload localStorage stored compactCards=true; after reload the same key remained with compactCards true while saved lookups still contained Validation Fixture#LOCAL only

assertionResults.reason: Validated in browser automation. After creating a zero-result filtered state, clicking Reset saved filters restored default filter values, removed the active-filter badge, restored both loaded matches, and reset persisted history preferences back to defaults.

evidence.consoleErrors: none via agent-browser errors during reset flow
evidence.localState: Post-reset localStorage value became the default history-preferences object with compactCards false
notes: after-reset body text showed Showing 2 of 2 loaded matches and both Ahri and Leona cards returned

assertionResults.reason: Validated in browser automation. Export control was enabled when filtered loaded history contained matches and became disabled when filters reduced the visible loaded result set to zero; the UI labeled the scope truthfully as filtered loaded matches.

evidence.consoleErrors: none via agent-browser errors after export-state checks
uiState: Unfiltered state showed Export scope: 2 filtered loaded matches with enabled export button
Victory-filtered state showed Export scope: 1 filtered loaded match
Zero-result state exposed exportDisabled=true in DOM inspection
evidence.fallbackEvidence: history-export.test.ts confirms export rows are built from filtered loaded history and deduplicated in loaded order

assertionResults.reason: Validated in browser automation and source inspection. The explicit deep-linked route correctly remained the source of truth for player identity, but persisted saved lookups/history preferences did not survive a revisit when preseeded localStorage was reloaded on the deep link: the app replaced the seeded values with default history preferences and only the active Validation Fixture lookup. This violates the coexistence requirement for preserved recent/history preferences.

evidence.localState: Preseeded localStorage with Saved Person plus Validation Fixture and non-default history preferences before reload; after reload localStorage reverted to defaults and saved lookups only contained Validation Fixture#LOCAL while URL still stayed on the deep link
sourceEvidence: components/dashboard/lol-stats-dashboard.tsx loads persisted preferences on mount then saves current state on every change
saved-lookups.ts subscribes to storage, but observed runtime revisit still rewrote seeded values during route-driven search

assertionResults.reason: The assigned deterministic fixture/runtime only exposes two stored matches with hasMore=false and no reachable older-history append path, so the mixed stored-plus-appended history flow could not be achieved through the real surface on this host. I used the approved fallback path to verify deterministic pagination/export logic evidence instead, but could not execute the full mixed append UI flow end-to-end.

evidence.consoleErrors: none from the exercised browser states
evidence.network: /api/stored-matches?puuid=validation-fixture-puuid&limit=1&offset=0 returned hasMore=true for page 1 and offset=1 returned hasMore=false for page 2; no API-backed older-history append was available for the fixture
testEvidence: lib/history-export.test.ts: deduplicates mixed loaded history while preserving first-seen order
lib/history-export.test.ts: maps filtered loaded history into truthful export rows
lib/validation-fixture.test.ts: validates paged stored matches shape for the fixture
evidence.constraint: No browser-visible Load more or older-history append path was available with the provided fixture or current runtime data

frictions.description: Form-field fill on the home route did not activate the Analyze button reliably through direct fill commands, so validation pivoted to the explicit deep-linked player route permitted by mission guidance.
frictions.resolution: Used /player/Validation%20Fixture#LOCAL as the primary browser entry for repeatable assertion coverage.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned no requests for this local Next.js session, so request evidence was supplemented with read-only local API calls and source inspection.
frictions.resolution: Used python urllib against local /api/account, /api/stored-matches, and /api/match-details endpoints as deterministic fallback evidence.

blockers.description: Mixed stored-history plus appended older-history UI path was not reachable with the deterministic fixture because the loaded dataset is capped at two matches and older-history append is unavailable (stored pages end at hasMore=false, no API append path surfaced).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked fixture source, exercised paged /api/stored-matches offsets 0 and 1, and reviewed export tests for fallback evidence; no non-disruptive way to create appended history in this isolation context.

summary: Tested 6 assigned history UX assertions. Passed: VAL-HISTORY-001/002/003/004. Failed: VAL-CROSS-002 because persisted recent/history state did not coexist across revisit as required. Blocked: VAL-CROSS-003 because the provided fixture/runtime did not expose a real mixed stored+older-history append path; fallback test/API evidence was collected instead.
